name: Inner Sailor Senshis
description: So you are attacked by a monster in Tokyo, Sailor Mercury, Sailor Mars, Sailor Jupiter and Sailor Venus come to your aid. You are hit by an attack from the monster that bathes the area around you in dazzling light. When you wake up again, the four Sailor Senshis are lying unconscious next to you and you find yourself in an abandoned, destroyed version of Tokyo. What happened...?
creator: DampfZypresse
